description:
The quiz assesses knowledge of HTML5 semantic elements, testing the ability to differentiate and correctly use tags beyond basic <div> and <span>. It is moderately challenging, presented in a playful, encouraging tone that nudges learners toward better markup practices. The style is informal and motivational, aiming to boost confidence while highlighting gaps.
Topics: HTML5 semantic tags, Proper element selection, Accessibility considerations, Modern web markup best practices
Audience: Front‑end developers, web designers, and anyone with basic HTML experience who wants to validate and improve their HTML5 skills.
